playwright_note: Chrome failed to launch — existing browser session conflict (pid exits 0 immediately). All criteria verified via static analysis of source files. Browser-dependent checks (render, UI interaction, live API calls) are noted as unverifiable.

criteria_results.criterion: Migration 017 schema: activity_log table with correct columns (id, workspace_id, user_id, action enum, entity_type, entity_id, entity_name, details JSONB, created_at)
criteria_results.evidence: supabase/migrations/017_activity_log.sql confirmed: all 9 columns present with correct types (UUID, TEXT, activity_action, JSONB, TIMESTAMPTZ). No updated_at column (correct for append-only log).

criteria_results.criterion: activity_action enum includes: created, updated, deleted, completed, assigned, commented, exported, shared
criteria_results.evidence: Migration 017 CREATE TYPE activity_action AS ENUM lists all 8 values. database.ts ActivityAction type mirrors them identically.

criteria_results.criterion: RLS policies: SELECT + INSERT only via can_access_workspace(), no UPDATE/DELETE
criteria_results.evidence: Migration 017 creates exactly 2 policies: 'activity_log_select' FOR SELECT and 'activity_log_insert' FOR INSERT WITH CHECK. No UPDATE/DELETE policies. Both use can_access_workspace(workspace_id).

criteria_results.criterion: Index on (workspace_id, created_at DESC) for efficient pagination
criteria_results.evidence: Migration 017: CREATE INDEX idx_activity_log_workspace ON activity_log(workspace_id, created_at DESC). Index name and column order match spec.

criteria_results.criterion: ActivityLog type in database.ts matches migration schema
criteria_results.evidence: src/types/database.ts lines 312-322: ActivityLog interface has id (string), workspace_id, user_id, action (ActivityAction), entity_type, entity_id, entity_name (all string), details (Record<string,unknown>|null), created_at. Exact match to migration columns.

criteria_results.criterion: API route GET /api/v1/activity: workspace_id required, supports user_id/action/entity_type/from/to/limit/offset filters
criteria_results.evidence: src/app/api/v1/activity/route.ts: validates workspace_id (400 if missing), reads all 7 filter params from searchParams, applies each conditionally. limit defaults to 50, offset defaults to 0.

criteria_results.criterion: API route returns paginated results with correct envelope format
criteria_results.evidence: Route uses .range(offset, offset + limit - 1) for pagination, returns successResponse(entries) which wraps in { data, error } envelope per response.ts convention.

criteria_results.criterion: logActivity() utility in lib/api/activity.ts: fire-and-forget pattern (no await, catches errors silently)
criteria_results.evidence: src/lib/api/activity.ts: function catches insert errors with console.error and does NOT re-throw. Callers in comments/route.ts, runbooks/route.ts use 'void logActivity(...)' (explicit fire-and-forget). steps/route.ts calls without 'void' but also without 'await' — semantically fire-and-forget, floating promise is safe because function handles its own errors. Minor style inconsistency only.

criteria_results.criterion: logActivity() accepts workspace_id, user_id, action, entity_type, entity_id, entity_name, optional details
criteria_results.evidence: LogActivityParams interface in activity.ts defines all 7 required fields plus optional details?: Record<string, unknown>. SupabaseClient passed as extra param for DB access.

criteria_results.criterion: Activity page UI at /w/[workspaceId]/activity: page.tsx server component + activity-view.tsx client component
criteria_results.evidence: Files confirmed: src/app/(app)/w/[workspaceId]/activity/page.tsx (server component with 'use client' absent, async function, redirect on unauthed) and activity-view.tsx ('use client' directive at line 1).

criteria_results.criterion: Activity view: chronological feed with action type filter tabs
criteria_results.evidence: activity-view.tsx: page.tsx orders by created_at DESC. View renders 'All' tab + 8 action filter buttons (ALL_ACTIONS array). Filter applied via useMemo on activeFilter state.

criteria_results.criterion: Activity view: entity links, relative timestamps, Load More pagination
criteria_results.evidence: activity-view.tsx: each entry renders a Link to /w/{workspaceId}/{tabId} or /w/{workspaceId} (fallback). formatRelativeTime() converts created_at to '5m ago' format. loadMore() fetches with offset=entries.length. 'Load More' button renders when hasMore=true (initialEntries.length===50).

criteria_results.criterion: Sidebar nav includes Activity item with correct icon and path
criteria_results.evidence: src/components/layout/sidebar.tsx line 44: { label: 'Activity', icon: Clock, href: '/activity' }. Clock icon from lucide-react.

criteria_results.criterion: workspace-shell.tsx reserved paths includes 'activity'
criteria_results.evidence: src/app/(app)/w/[workspaceId]/workspace-shell.tsx line 47: reserved paths array includes 'activity' alongside 'teams', 'settings', 'runbooks', etc.

criteria_results.criterion: logActivity() integrated in POST handlers (spot-check: workspaces, steps, sections, connections, comments, tasks, runbooks)
criteria_results.evidence: Verified: steps/route.ts POST calls logActivity (action=created). comments/route.ts POST calls logActivity (action=commented). runbooks/route.ts POST calls logActivity (action=created). Pattern consistent across routes — all import from @/lib/api/activity.

criteria_results.criterion: logActivity() integrated in PATCH handlers (spot-check: workspaces, steps, sections, runbooks, runbook-steps)
criteria_results.evidence: Verified: steps/[id]/route.ts PATCH calls logActivity (action=updated). runbooks/[id]/route.ts PATCH calls logActivity with action= 'completed' or 'updated' based on updates.status.

criteria_results.criterion: logActivity() integrated in DELETE handlers (spot-check: workspaces, steps, sections, connections, comments, tasks)
criteria_results.evidence: Verified: steps/[id]/route.ts DELETE calls logActivity (action=deleted). comments/[id]/route.ts DELETE calls logActivity (action=deleted). Pattern consistent.

criteria_results.criterion: Special actions: comments POST uses 'commented', runbooks PATCH to completed uses 'completed', shares POST uses 'shared'
criteria_results.evidence: comments/route.ts line 123: action='commented'. runbooks/[id]/route.ts line 83: const action = updates.status === 'completed' ? 'completed' : 'updated'. shares/route.ts line 64: action='shared'. All 3 special cases verified.

criteria_results.criterion: Entities without direct workspace_id (roles, people, step-roles, annotations, runbook-steps) use async IIFE for parent chain traversal
criteria_results.evidence: roles/route.ts lines 38-43 and roles/[id]/route.ts lines 44-49, 78-83: void (async () => { const { data: team } = await supabase.from('teams').select('workspace_id')... await logActivity(...) })() pattern confirmed.

criteria_results.criterion: Client wrapper fetchActivityLog() in lib/api/client.ts with correct typing
criteria_results.evidence: src/lib/api/client.ts lines 654-672: fetchActivityLog(workspaceId: string, filters?: {...}): Promise<ActivityLog[]>. Builds URLSearchParams, calls apiFetch<ActivityLog[]>. Imports ActivityLog from @/types/database.

quality_gate.note: Quality gate not run — Playwright unavailable. Static analysis substituted for code-level checks.

checks.evidence: EXECUTION_PLAN.json validation.compilation_status='passing'. BUILD_RESULT_1.json (iter 94) verification.typecheck.status='pass' with 0 errors.
BUILD_RESULT_1.json lint.status='pass'. 1 pre-existing warning in flow-canvas.tsx (addEdge unused) — known acceptable.

checks.check: API auth guards return 401 for unauthenticated requests
checks.evidence: activity/route.ts: if (!user) return errorResponse('unauthorized', ..., 401). Pattern confirmed in static analysis.

checks.check: Activity page: renders with filter tabs and pagination
checks.evidence: Static analysis confirms page.tsx server component + activity-view.tsx with All/8 action filter tabs and Load More button.
Playwright unavailable. Browser render checks require live app.

improvements_found.observation: Activity entries display user_id.slice(0,8) as author identity (e.g., 'a3f2b1c0'). Users have no way to identify who performed an action without cross-referencing raw UUIDs.
improvements_found.design_principle: Nielsen H1: Visibility of system status — users should know who did what at a glance
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Either join activity_log to users table in the page.tsx server fetch (add .select('*, users(email, full_name)') if DB supports it), or add a user_email column to activity_log at insert time.

improvements_found.observation: Filter tabs (Created, Updated, etc.) filter client-side on already-fetched entries. When Load More is used and then a filter is applied, the filter only applies to loaded entries — the DB may have matching entries not yet fetched.
improvements_found.design_principle: Nielsen H6: Recognition rather than recall — filter results should be complete and accurate
improvements_found.suggested_approach: When a filter tab is activated, reset entries and re-fetch from the API with the action= filter param instead of filtering client-side. This ensures pagination aligns with the selected filter.

improvements_found.observation: Empty state for 'No activity yet' uses a Clock icon but provides no guidance on how to generate activity (e.g., 'Add a step to your canvas to see activity here').
improvements_found.design_principle: Empty states should guide users to value, not just confirm absence
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Add a short contextual hint in the empty state: 'Actions like creating steps, adding comments, and completing runbooks appear here.'
